checks.name: windows-home-resolution-regressions
checks.detail: Shared tests cover Windows HOME, USERPROFILE, HOMEDRIVE/HOMEPATH, and runtime local state fallback.

checks.name: windows-codex-shim-detection
checks.detail: Runtime adapter and bootstrap tests pass for Windows-like codex.cmd shim discovery via Path/PATHEXT.

checks.name: bot-first-run-env-path
checks.detail: Bot startup now recovers a valid TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN from .env when shell state is placeholder and otherwise logs actionable setup guidance.
